_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: How many Great Runes are needed to challenge the final boss
How many Great Runes are needed to enter Leyndell
Determines whether the Grand Lift of Rold is accessed using Great Runes, if the Rold Medallion is given by Melina after killing Morgott (vanilla), or randomized into the pool
How many Great Runes are needed to open the Grand Lift of Rold
This does nothing if Rold Medallion is set to 'Item'
Determines how the game expects you to be locked behind progressive max levels and progressive upgrade stones
'All Locations' logically gates all locations in a region until you have the expected levels and stones
'Boss Locations' only logically gates Major Bosses locations in a region until you have the expected levels and stones
Note that bosses that block non-boss locations and travel between areas are taken into logic
if enabled, shop locations are added into the pool
Enabling this option adds useful items to the pool
If enabled, Sacred Tear and Golden Seed locations are added into the pool
Enabling this option adds useful items to the pool
If enabled, Great Runes are placed at vanilla locations
If enabled, the Academy Glintstone Key is placed in Sphere 1
